title: logformatter: nicer formatting for bats failures
body:
add a new failblock style, with light red background all across
the entire page, and use it for bats "FAIL" blocks.
    
Also highlight logrus level=(debug|info|warning|error|fatal)
messages in increasingly prominent styles

Also refactored a cluttery `print` sequence, because I thought I'd
be using it for this prettification. Turns out I didn't, but the
refactoring (first commit) still seems worth keeping.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

/hold cancel

Semi-bummer: I was half hoping for a flake, so we could confirm the new error format. Ya never gets flakes when ya wants 'em.

Followup: [sample failure](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6264635339309056/html/sys-podman-fedora-36-root-host.log.html#t--00133) shows that new formatter works as desired (warnings in orange, failure block highlighted with red background).
